DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
example extensions link metadata presentation purpose rich-text status
component pattern style theme token
accessibility anatomy api best-practice content design-specifications guideline interaction motion principle scale state variant

DSDS Purpose Guideline

Documents what an artifact is used for — the concrete scenarios in which it is the right choice and the scenarios in which a different artifact would be more appropriate. The purpose guideline wraps the common useCases data model with a guideline `type` discriminator so it can appear in the unified guidelines array on any entity. This follows the same pattern used by variant values and state entries, where a `useCases` property holds the whenToUse / whenNotToUse arrays.

Source: common/purpose.schema.json

2 definitions in this file:

  • useCase
  • purpose

useCase

A single use case scenario describing a situation in which an artifact or option is or is not appropriate.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
descriptionrichTextrequiredA description of the scenario. Should be concrete and situation-driven — describe the user's situation, not the artifact's features.
kind"positive" | "negative"optionalDescribes whether the use case is an example to follow or to not follow.
alternativeobjectoptionalThe recommended alternative artifact for this scenario. Typically provided for whenNotToUse entries to direct the reader toward a more appropriate component, pattern, or token.

References: richText

purpose

Documents the purpose of an artifact — when to reach for it and when to choose something else. Contains a `useCases` object with whenToUse and whenNotToUse arrays of scenario-driven use case entries drawn from the common useCases schema. This follows the same pattern used by variant values and state entries. Purpose guidelines help the reader decide whether this is the right artifact *before* they start implementing it. For guidance on *how* to use the artifact correctly after choosing it, see best-practices. For guidance on *what* the artifact looks like and how it behaves, see variants, states, and anatomy.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
kind"purpose"requiredIdentifies this guideline as a purpose specification.
useCasesuseCase[]optionalScenario-driven guidance describing when this artifact is or is not the right choice.

References: useCase
